CustomField.description: This is the next scheduled event date by adding "never exceed period month" from Maintenance Program Event to "last event date". In case "last event date" is not available, "date of manufacture" will be used.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is the next scheduled event date by adding "never exceed period month" from Maintenance Program Event to "last event date". In case "last event date" is not available, "date of manufacture" will be used.
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_1219_Esc Overhaul Cost
